case_title: GROSVENOR PROPERTIES LTD., A CALIF CORPORATION vs. WOLF, MARK et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GROSVENOR PROPERTIES LTD., A CALIF CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOLF, MARK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON FEB. 7, 1996 $11,000.00 RENT, $202.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,202.00, LEASE FORFEITED
